channel.title: Vaccine-Response on Kinda Log
channel.description: Recent content in Vaccine-Response on Kinda Log

item.title: [Vaccine/논문] Immune response stability differential splicing of HLA
item.description: [Vaccine/논문] Immune response stability to the SARS‐CoV‐2 mRNA vaccine booster is influenced by differential splicing of HLA genes # Abstract # Many molecular mechanisms that lead to the host antibody response to COVID‐19 vaccines remain largely unknown. In this study, we used serum antibody detection combined with whole blood RNA‐ based transcriptome analysis to investigate variability in vaccine response in healthy recipients of a booster (third) dose schedule of the mRNA BNT162b2 vaccine against COVID‐19.

item.title: [Vaccine/논문] Single-cell profiling of T and B cell repertoires following SARS-CoV-2 mRNA vaccine
item.description: [Vaccine/논문] Single-cell profiling of T and B cell repertoires following SARS-CoV-2 mRNA vaccine # Abstract # mRNA vaccines for SARS-CoV-2 have shown exceptional clinical efficacy, providing robust protection against severe disease. However, our understanding of transcriptional and repertoire changes following full vaccination remains incomplete. We used scRNA-Seq and functional assays to compare humoral and cellular responses to 2 doses of mRNA vaccine with responses observed in convalescent individuals with asymptomatic disease.
